# Studios By Ritumbhara

> Professionally managed short-term rental assets for property owners in Jaipur, Rajasthan. We operate on a FOCO (Franchise Owned, Company Operated) model — you own the property, we run it, you earn 20%+ annual returns.

## About
Studios By Ritumbhara is a hospitality and property management company based in Jaipur, Rajasthan, India. Founded by Shivam Lohiya, the company manages studio apartments as premium short-term rentals on platforms like Airbnb. The Lohiya family has deep roots in Rajasthan hospitality, also operating Ritumbhara Resort in Alwar.

## What We Do
- Full-service short-term rental management (Airbnb, booking platforms)
- Interior setup and design for rental-ready studio apartments
- Dynamic pricing and revenue optimization
- Guest screening, check-in/check-out, housekeeping
- Monthly performance reports and transparent payouts to owners
- Legal compliance and documentation support

## FOCO Model
Franchise Owned, Company Operated. The property owner invests in the asset. Studios By Ritumbhara handles 100% of operations. Owners receive passive income with 20%+ annual rental yield — compared to 4-6% from traditional long-term rentals.

## Why Jaipur
- One of India's top tourism destinations with year-round demand
- Growing corporate and business travel segment
- High-spending international and domestic tourists
- Undersupplied premium studio rental market
- Strong Airbnb and short-term rental ecosystem

## Results
- 20%+ annual rental yield delivered to property owners
- 4.8+ average guest rating across managed properties
- Properties listed and actively managed on Airbnb

## Location
Jaipur, Rajasthan, India
